title: gastrochilus calceolaris
intro: Gastrochilus calceolaris, also known as the Slipper Orchid, is a type of flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The Slipper Orchid has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
